title: AWS backends: build_client pattern triplicated — one bug requires 3 fixes
description: Trigger: any bug found in the scoped-thread + single-thread-runtime + panic-mapping boilerplate in aws-sm, aws-ssm, aws-kms. Must be fixed in 3 places independently. Suggested fix: add a block_on_new_thread<F,T> utility to secretx-core (or a private shared crate) so all three backends delegate to a single implementation.
